subject: Re: Fwd: Freaking out on St. Thomas
body:
copy cecil, how can I guarantee anything,, i have yet to review the numbers , or even know the amount of money ?


----- Original Message ----
From: Darren <dkiesq@aol.com>
To: jeffrey epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Wednesday, February 27, 2008 7:49:46 PM
Subject: Fwd: Freaking out on St. Thomas


Let's talk tomorrow

Sent from my iPhone

Begin forwarded message:


From: "Shaun A. Pennington" <source@viaccess.net>
Date: February 27, 2008 7:39:10 PM EST
To: "Darren Indyke" <dkiesq@aol.com>
Subject: Freaking out on St. Thomas


Dear Darren,
After all that Cecile has said about what kind of person you are, I feel like I can be truthful with you. I am freaking out here. I am rapidly running out of time.
My fault. I had felt all along that this was a done deal as far as Jeffrey was concerned…not that you didn’t need to review the details and do proper due diligence. 
But here’s my problem today. I have to meet with the credit bankers tomorrow. Meanwhile, I have to have my package in the hands of the trustee a week from Monday. That package must include the bank’s letter of financing support. If I don’t have that I am out of the running for good and very embarrassed.  I have one week to find a new way to go after what I need for security if you are not able to provide it. 
I have some folks waiting in the wing as I mentioned, but that is not my first choice for several reasons, not the least of which is the timing.
Can you please let me know where you are with this? I have applications to complete and they need to show what my investor/supporter is willing to provide for down payments and collateral. 
And you and I need to work out the terms of the support and direct loans.
Help!!!!!  I need to know what to do here.
If I need to look elsewhere I need to let the bankers know that tomorrow and try to pull this off.
I hope that is not what I have to do…please let me know.
Thank you so much for your understanding.
Shaun 
=

Dear Darren,

After all that Cecile has said about what kind of person you are, I feel like I can be truthful with you. I am freaking out here. I am rapidly running out of time.

My fault. I had felt all along that this was a done deal as far as Jeffrey was concerned…not that you didn’t need to review the details and do proper due diligence.

But here’s my problem today. I have to meet with the credit bankers tomorrow. Meanwhile, I have to have my package in the hands of the trustee a week from Monday. That package must include the bank’s letter of financing support. If I don’t have that I am out of the running for good and very embarrassed.  I have one week to find a new way to go after what I need for security if you are not able to provide it.

I have some folks waiting in the wing as I mentioned, but that is not my first choice for several reasons, not the least of which is the timing.

Can you please let me know where you are with this? I have applications to complete and they need to show what my investor/supporter is willing to provide for down payments and collateral.

And you and I need to work out the terms of the support and direct loans.

Help!!!!!  I need to know what to do here.
